name: guitarbook
description: A static GuitarBook acoustic-guitar teaching website template.

scripts.test: node --check assets/app.js && node --check assets/bootstrap.js && node --check assets/catalog-runtime.js && node --check assets/data.js && node --check assets/guitar-tuner.js && node --check assets/guitar-tuner-core.js && node --check functions/_lib/auth.js && node --check functions/_lib/catalog.js && node --check functions/_lib/http.js && node --check functions/api/admin/activate.js && node --check functions/api/admin/publish.js && node --check functions/api/admin/publish-batch.js && node --check functions/api/catalog/current.js && node --check functions/api/catalog/releases/[releaseId].js && node --check functions/media/[[path]].js && node --check scripts/build-site.mjs && node --check scripts/publish-content.mjs && node --check admin/media.mjs && node --check admin/publisher.mjs && node --check admin/remote-publisher.mjs && node --test tests/core.test.mjs tests/catalog-runtime.test.mjs tests/content-api.test.mjs tests/content-batch.test.mjs tests/content-batch-route.test.mjs tests/content-publisher.test.mjs tests/build-site.test.mjs tests/admin-publisher.test.mjs tests/admin-remote-publisher.test.mjs
